scope.objective: Type-3 DFIG controlled fault/LVRT pre-interface audit

sources.snapshot_note: external/pscad_snapshot_20260623 was requested but was not present in the current repository checkout.

existing_fault_or_event_interfaces.name: E_16_24_1
existing_fault_or_event_interfaces.reason: Built-in line fault parameters are disabled and the line is not the Type-3/N30 22 kV POC branch.

existing_fault_or_event_interfaces.name: Trip
existing_fault_or_event_interfaces.reason: Located near the N32/G32 trip branch, not the Type-3 22 kV POC. It is a switching event, not a shunt fault.

existing_fault_or_event_interfaces.name: BRK
existing_fault_or_event_interfaces.reason: Existing breaker/switch object, not a three-phase fault shunt, and not located at the Type-3 POC.

existing_fault_or_event_interfaces.name: BRK_DFIG
existing_fault_or_event_interfaces.reason: Type-3 branch isolation breaker. It must remain closed during the first LVRT response check.

official_type3_reference_interfaces.name: POC Fault
official_type3_reference_interfaces.control_concept_to_borrow: Fault switch + Flt type selector + monostable pulse, T=0.150 s.

official_type3_reference_interfaces.name: Terminal Fault
official_type3_reference_interfaces.control_concept_to_borrow: Fault switch + Flt type selector + monostable pulse, T=0.150 s.

measurement_mapping_current.name: SPD30
measurement_mapping_current.convention: system frequency candidate; not Type-3 internal Freq_PLL

measurement_mapping_current.name: PIBR1_2
measurement_mapping_current.convention: positive in current meter orientation; no-fault Type-3 output is about +199 MW

measurement_mapping_current.name: QIBR1_2
measurement_mapping_current.convention: current meter orientation; no-fault Q is negative

measurement_mapping_current.name: DFIG_VWIND_MS
measurement_mapping_current.convention: Rate Limiter output sent to Type3 Vwind

measurement_mapping_current.name: DFIG_DBLK_CMD
measurement_mapping_current.convention: external Dblk command; transitions to 1 after about 0.2 s

candidate_fault_interfaces.name: Candidate A: Type-3 22 kV POC / collector-side node
candidate_fault_interfaces.why: Directly stresses the Type-3 branch POC voltage measured by existing channels, while keeping upstream network and standalone Type-3 test environment out of the model.
risks: Static XML cannot prove the exact three-phase node terminal selection.
GUI must confirm the fault is a shunt branch and not a series insertion.
GUI must confirm it is not placed on the old IBR branch.

candidate_fault_interfaces.name: Candidate B: 33 kV Type-3 terminal-side
candidate_fault_interfaces.why: Closer to the Type-3 terminal but existing P/Q/V measurements are on the 22 kV side, so this is less suitable for the first minimal-risk test.
risks: May require new 33 kV measurement channels.
Harder to compare directly with current PIBR1_2/QIBR1_2/VIBR1_2 baseline.

candidate_fault_interfaces.name: Candidate C: N30/GBUS30 upstream 22 kV bus
candidate_fault_interfaces.why: More system-level disturbance but higher risk of affecting remaining IBRs and wider IEEE-39 dynamics.
risks: May disturb more of the system than intended for the first Type-3 LVRT smoke test.
Could interact with existing Trip/BRK/line events.

draft_first_fault_plan_not_implemented.fault_type: temporary three-phase-to-ground shunt fault; no line trip
draft_first_fault_plan_not_implemented.preferred_location: Candidate A: Type-3 22 kV POC / collector-side node

start_time_s.reason: After DFIG_DBLK_CMD has been high since about 0.2 s and after no-fault settling.

duration_s.reason: Borrowed as a control concept from official Type-3 monostable timing; not a paper parameter.

fault_impedance.guidance: Do not copy official RON=0.01/0.2 ohm for the first light test. Tune for a mild voltage dip, initially targeting VIBR1_2 not below about 0.8 pu.

stop_criteria: DFIG_BRK_STATE changes from the closed convention
P/Q/V/f sustained drift or growing oscillation
fault node or measurement semantics cannot be confirmed

manual_gui_confirmations_required_next: Confirm Candidate A is the BRK_DFIG left-side 22 kV POC node near PIBR1_2/QIBR1_2/VIBR1_2, not an old IBR branch.
Confirm the future fault block will be a shunt branch to the node, not a series insertion or rewiring of the Type-3 branch.
Confirm BRK_DFIG remains closed during the planned fault and DFIG_BRK_STATE=0 still means closed.

confirmed_facts: No reusable master:tpflt three-phase fault component was found in the current 3IBR model.
E_16_24_1 contains disabled built-in line fault parameters but is not the Type-3 POC branch.
Existing Trip/BRK/BRK_DFIG objects are switching devices, not the first LVRT shunt fault interface.
External DFIG measurement channels are available for the first fault response check.
overall_conclusion.static_inference: The lowest-risk first LVRT interface is a new, disabled-by-default, temporary three-phase shunt fault at the Type-3 22 kV POC/collector-side node near the existing P/Q/V multimeter and BRK_DFIG.
overall_conclusion.do_not_implement_until: The three manual GUI confirmations are completed.
